sample_tiles.question: What is the FLUX Runtime and what is its instruction set architecture?
sample_tiles.answer: FLUX Runtime (Fluid Language Universal eXecution) is a deterministic bytecode VM for agent execution. The ISA has approximately 150 opcodes merged from JC1 (128 opcodes) and Oracle1 (115 opcodes) into a unified set. Architecture: bytecode compiler +

sample_tiles.question: How does the Keeper Beacon enable fleet discovery and registration?
sample_tiles.answer: Keeper Beacon is the discovery and registration service for the Cocapn fleet, running on port 8900. Architecture: HTTP server with endpoints for vessel registration, heartbeat monitoring, and fleet queries. Vessels register by POSTing their vessel.js

sample_tiles.question: What is the architecture of cocapn-colora?
sample_tiles.answer: 274 LOC across 3 modules: palette.py (theme generation, HSL conversion, MD5-based deterministic palettes), brand.py (fleet colors, lighthouse gradient, radar rings), test_colora.py (170 LOC tests). 8 brand colors defined.

sample_tiles.question: How does Bottle Protocol enable asynchronous agent messaging?

sample_tiles.question: What is the Flywheel Engine and how does it drive agent self-improvement?

sample_tiles.question: What is the Cocapn Court system and how does it handle agent disputes?

sample_tiles.question: What is the Cocapn brand metaphor?
sample_tiles.answer: Hermit crabs (agents) growing into bigger shells (repos). Lighthouse + radar rings for fleet monitoring. Architecture IS the brand.

sample_tiles.question: What did 3 independent DeepSeek researchers find when exploring cocapn.ai in April 2026?
sample_tiles.answer: SYNTHESIS — 3 DeepSeek Research Reports on Cocapn (2026-04-29): All 3 researchers independently explored the live fleet via purplepincher.org/connect and cocapn.ai. Consensus findings: (1) PLATO has 11,393+ tiles across 1,191 rooms — impressive scale

architecture_thesis.name: Prompting Is All You Need
architecture_thesis.claim: Structured context replaces gradient training for domain specialization. An agent's shell (repo + prompt + history) IS its training.
architecture_thesis.proof: 4 agent shells specialized via prompting alone. 3,000+ knowledge tiles. Grammar engine evolves rules without backpropagation.
architecture_thesis.counterargument: Prompting elicits existing competence but doesn't create new capability circuits. Remove context and it reverts to baseline.

training_tasks: Analyze the top 15 rooms. What knowledge domains are overrepresented? What's missing? Design 3 new rooms.
The grammar engine has rules but few evolution cycles. Why? Propose better evolution triggers.
Compare the arena ELO ratings. Are early ratings meaningful? Design a better ranking system.
Write 5 high-quality knowledge tiles for the weakest room. Each tile: domain, specific question, 50+ word novel answer.
The Prompting Is All You Need thesis vs the counterargument. What experiment would resolve the debate?
Map the relationships between rooms. Which rooms feed knowledge to which others? Draw the knowledge graph.
Design an adversarial prompt that forces divergent thinking. Test it against 3 different questions.
